cc.name: Content Collector
cc.description: Autonomous local pipeline — noisy tech streams to a daily, decision-ready brief.
cc.overview:
Tracking RSS, Reddit, and Threads manually is noisy and fragmented. Content Collector separates signal from noise automatically.

Continuous ingestion, local Qwen3 14B classification, BGE-M3 embeddings in PostgreSQL + pgvector for semantic retrieval. Gemini generates concise editorial summaries.

Full stack on a single Mac Mini — Docker Compose, LaunchAgent scheduling. LINE digest, HTML report, real-time alerts. Zero monthly cost.
